hypothesis: If ML interatomic potential models (MACE, NequIP, ViSNet) are implemented in the proposed JAX-based library—using the modified MACE with gating and species-dependent edge features—and trained on the curated SPICE2 dataset, then GPU molecular dynamics simulations will run in less wall-clock time than equivalent Torch+ASE baselines while achieving comparable energy/force errors, because XLA compilation and the architectural modifications reduce inference cost without degrading accuracy.
